Title: User Registration
Preconditions: User does not exist in the system.
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Valid password: Password123!
- Invalid email: invalid-email
- Invalid password: short
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter valid email and password.
3. Submit the registration form.
4. Repeat steps 2-3 with invalid email and password.
Expected Result:
- Successful registration with valid email and password.
- Error message displayed for invalid email and password.

Title: Validate Login Credentials
Preconditions: User is registered in the system.
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Valid password: Password123!
- Invalid email: invalid-email
- Invalid password: wrongpassword
Test Steps:
1. User initiates login process.
2. System processes login request.

4. User receives login success or failure message.

- Error message displayed for invalid email and password.

Title: User Registration with Firebase Authentication
Preconditions: User does not exist in the system.
Test Data:
- Valid email: test@example.com
- Valid password: Password123!
- Invalid email: invalid-email
- Invalid password: short
Test Steps:
1. User inserts registration data.
2. UI sends createAccount request to FirebaseAuthentication.
3. FirebaseAuthentication validates token.
4. FirebaseRestore validates token.
5. Repeat steps 1-4 with invalid email and password.
Expected Result:
- Successful registration with valid email and password.
- Error message displayed for invalid email and password.

Title: Insert Signal with Image Upload
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data:
- Valid signal data: "Noise complaint"
- Invalid signal data: ""
- Valid image file: image.jpg
- Invalid image file: invalidfile.txt
Test Steps:
1. User inserts signal data.
2. UI checks for incomplete or incorrect data.
3. User uploads image.
4. Firebase/Firestore confirms signal with assigned entity.
5. Repeat steps 1-4 with invalid signal data and invalid image file.
Expected Result:
- Successful insertion of signal with valid data and image.
- Error message displayed for incomplete or incorrect data and invalid image file.

Title: Handle Loop for Incomplete or Incorrect Signal Data
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: - Invalid signal data: ""
Test Steps:
1. User inserts invalid signal data.
2. UI checks for incomplete or incorrect data.
3. User retries inserting valid signal data.
4. UI checks for incomplete or incorrect data.
Expected Result:
- Loop continues until valid signal data is inserted.
- Error message displayed for each attempt with invalid data.

Title: Confirm Signal with Assigned Entity
Preconditions: User is logged in and has uploaded a valid image.
Test Data:
- Valid signal data: "Noise complaint"
- Valid image file: image.jpg
Test Steps:
1. User inserts valid signal data.
2. UI checks for incomplete or incorrect data.
3. User uploads valid image.
4. Firebase/Firestore confirms signal with assigned entity.
Expected Result: - Signal is confirmed with assigned entity after valid data and image upload.

Title: Handle Error for Missing Image File
Preconditions: User is logged in and has inserted valid signal data.

- Valid signal data: "Noise complaint"
- Missing image file

1. User inserts valid signal data.
2. UI checks for incomplete or incorrect data.
3. User attempts to submit without uploading an image.
Expected Result: - Error message displayed for missing image file.
